phases.description: Verify blocking findings, accepted risks, provider-managed risks, capacity, observability, and backups before this version hop.
phases.name: prechecks

phases.description: Upgrade the Kubernetes control plane first.
phases.name: control-plane-upgrade

phases.description: Validate API server health, admission behavior, Argo CD sync state, and core platform controllers.
phases.name: post-control-plane-validation

phases.description: Upgrade system node pools with controlled drain and workload validation.
phases.name: system-nodepool-upgrade

phases.description: Upgrade application node pools by wave, starting with the lowest-risk workloads.
phases.name: user-nodepool-upgrade

phases.description: Validate application readiness, SLO dashboards, alerts, and rollback criteria before continuing.
phases.name: application-validation
